info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce operations including products, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as listing, adding, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders including creation, tracking, and updating order status.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account related operations including registration, authentication, and profile management.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing necessary user details. The request body should contain user information including name, email, and password. On success, it returns the registered user data.

example.message: User registration data is incomplete or invalid
A user with the given email already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a specific user
post.description: Place an order on behalf of the user identified by userId. The operation creates an order and returns order details once the order has been successfully created.

example.message: Order placement request contains invalid data

details.issue: User identifier is missing or malformed

example.message: No user found for the provided userId
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetch detailed information of an order identified by orderId. Returns order information including items, status, and related data.

example.message: The orderId provided is invalid
No order exists with the specified orderId
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's shopping cart
post.description: Add one or more items to the shopping cart belonging to the user identified by userId. The request body must specify the product, quantity, and any relevant options. On success, returns the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Shopping cart item details to be added

example.message: Cart item data is incomplete or invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart contents for a user
get.description: Fetch the current items in the shopping cart for the specified userId. Returns list of items, quantities, and pricing information.

example.message: The userId provided is invalid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping status and tracking details for the specified order identified by orderId. Returns tracking information including carrier, status updates, and estimated delivery date.

200.description: Successful response with the tracking information

404.description: Order not found or tracking information unavailable

example.message: The order with the specified ID was not found.

details.issue: No order matches the given ID

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and add a new product to the product catalog. The request body must contain all required product details such as name, description, price, and inventory count. Successful creation returns the stored product information.

example.name: Ergonomic Office Chair
example.description: Comfortable adjustable office chair with lumbar support

example.message: Some product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous payment notifications from external payment providers. The request body contains payment status updates which should be processed accordingly. Returns confirmation of receipt.

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

details.issue: Status field is required and must be one of the allowed values

402.description: Payment required or payment processing error

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment provider.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns payment transaction details and status upon processing.

requestBody.description: Payment details for initiating the transaction

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

402.description: Payment required or failed to process

example.message: Payment was declined or failed during processing.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier assigned by the payment processor.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current status of the order processing.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user information was last updated.

rating.description: Average user rating of the product.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available in stock.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Quantity of the product available in stock.

quantity.description: The number of units ordered of the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit on the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: The number of units of the product in the cart

productId.description: Identifier of the product added to the cart

price.description: Unit price of the product before discount

discount.description: Discount per unit applied on the product

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after applying discount

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

orderId.description: Identifier of the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service delivering the order

trackingId.description: Tracking identifier provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total amount before discounts for all items in the cart

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied across all cart items

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g., credit card, PayPal

paymentGateway.description: Payment gateway used to process the transaction

phone.description: User's phone number with country code

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., admin, customer

createdAt.description: Date and time when the payment was created (ISO 8601 format)

orderId.description: Order identifier associated with the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the payment

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used for the transaction

currency.description: Currency of the payment in ISO 4217 code

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier from the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created (ISO 8601 format)

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 2-year battery life

currency.description: Currency code for the product price (ISO 4217)

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the client error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

path.description: API endpoint path that triggered the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request

details.description: List of specific validation or field errors

field.description: Name of the field that caused the error

issue.description: Description of the specific issue with the field

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code for the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the request
